decisions.title: Phase 1 no-loss bootstrap order normalized
decisions.summary: Active AI-PM bootstrap docs now align on the lean order: charter, repo authority, targeted OpenMemory, recovery bundle, STATE summary, one selective deep read, then ledger fallback.

decisions.title: Repo openmemory rule now follows the flat live runtime
decisions.summary: The active rule no longer claims or requires project_id, namespace, user_preference, memory_types, or metadata/filter support that the installed runtime does not expose.

decisions.title: Machine-global overlays were subordinated to repo-tracked AI-PM policy
decisions.summary: The global Obsidian gate, AI-PM governance hint, and thinking-patterns reminder were narrowed so they cannot silently broaden bootstrap or outrank repo-tracked no-loss rules.

patterns.title: Lean recovery path
patterns.summary: Default recovery now stops after the first selective deep read unless the ledger is specifically needed one block at a time.

patterns.title: Installed MCP descriptor inventory
patterns.summary: The active tri-workspace MCP descriptor set is 9 servers: Context7, thinking-patterns, openmemory, filesystem, serena, droidrun, obsidian-vault, Magic MCP, and Artiforge.

patterns.title: Obsidian sidecar discipline
patterns.summary: Obsidian is sidecar-only, never canonical, and non-blocking when degraded; pending sidecar sync remains in session-summary.md until a later flush succeeds.
